heading: Thuringowa Central vs Thursday Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thuringowa Central, Queensland and Thursday Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thursday Island has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Thuringowa Central (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thuringowa Central or Thursday Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thuringowa Central has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Thursday Island scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thuringowa Central scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Thursday Island scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thuringowa Central or Thursday Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thursday Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
